scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 15 (Surat al-Anbiya' and Surat al-Hajj).

terms.arabic: حكى فيه العلماء الخلاف / حكى الخلاف لفلان
terms.transliteration: haka fihi al-'ulama' al-khilaf / haka al-khilaf li-fulan
terms.english: the scholars reported disagreement regarding it / disagreement was reported for a given authority
terms.note: Used when the commentator records a transmitted dispute over whether one counting authority counts a given place.

terms.english: the preferred view; the stronger view
terms.note: Marks the commentator's or the tradition's preferred position when variant reports exist.

terms.english: to state decisively that; to affirm categorically that
terms.note: Stronger than merely transmitting a report; indicates that an authority such as al-Dani presents the matter without hesitation.
A phrase used to clarify whether a disputed expression is treated as one of the formally counted verse endings.
